falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4,200 on any single day within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern match is invalidated because that pattern held a higher low; a break below 4,200 would confirm structural weakness inconsistent with a bottom formation and suggest the 78% similarity was a false analog

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score of 39 typically coincides with peak fear; sustained VIX above 35 indicates fear is escalating rather than dissipating, invalidating the HOLD signal which assumes stabilization or mean reversion in volatility

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops more than 40 basis points from current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A rapid flight-to-quality rally of this magnitude would signal recession panic or systemic stress, breaking the pattern of bottom_2024_aug which occurred during a controlled disinflationary environment, and proving the macro regime has shifted to crisis mode

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
